# ===== Subtask 1: N, Q <= 100, K <= 100 (15% ~ 3 tests) =====
random 100 1000000000 100 1001
random 50 500 50 1002
min 1003

# ===== Subtask 2: N, Q <= 300 (15% ~ 3 tests) =====
random 300 1000000000 1000000000000000000 2001
random 200 1000000000 1000000000000000000 2002
max 300 1000000000 1000000000000000000 2003

# ===== Subtask 3: N, Q <= 1500 (25% ~ 5 tests) =====
random 1500 1000000000 1000000000000000000 3001
random 1500 1000000000 1000000000000000000 3002
max 1500 1000000000 1000000000000000000 3003
equal 1500 1000000000 1000000000000000000 3004
sorted 1500 1000000000 1000000000000000000 3005

# ===== Subtask 4: A_i <= 100, N/Q to (25% ~ 5 tests) =====
random 400000 100 1000000000000000000 4001
random 400000 100 1000000000000000000 4002
max 400000 100 1000000000000000000 4003
equal 400000 100 1000000000000000000 4004
bigk 400000 100 4005

# ===== Subtask 5: Full constraints (20% ~ 4 tests) =====
random 400000 1000000000 1000000000000000000 5001
random 400000 1000000000 1000000000000000000 5002
max 400000 1000000000 1000000000000000000 5003
bigk 400000 1000000000 5004
